name: The Outer Side
short_description: Explore an abandoned black-n-white world, utilize your abilities to fight danger, and find the truth about this place.
detailed_description:
You need to stay alive in this horror-puzzle adventure. By mistake, you ended up in a world of outcasts. People have been living there for years, but no one knows what's going on there. Apparently, there's only one way to find out..

FIND OUT WHAT HAPPENS ON THE OUTER SIDE:

  • Fight monsters and any danger that might find you. Use your abilities and powers to your advantage.

  • Solve puzzles, and navigate through this endless labyrinth of horrors. As each level has it's own taste.

  • Find the truth. Explore this world, find left audio logs, feel the story. As you never know, what might find you next.

  • The horror is not only about jumpscares, but the psychology of the character and his inner demons.

Note from the Developer

This game was made by one person, (hello it's me, aqua). I've spent about 7 months working on this game, while going through a lot in life. Personally, when I was younger, I was a big fan of this style and genre, but I don't see much games like this since.

So with that, I created this project, that really means a lot to me. So if you decide to purchase a copy, thank you. I hope that you'll enjoy this little indie horror I created.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian
*languages with full audio support
